title: ageratina websteri
intro: Ageratina websteri, also known as Webster's ageratina or Mexican ageratina, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of phenolic compounds and iridoid glycosides. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing digestive issues. Ageratina websteri can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
